failure_movement.justification: Predicted unknown shrinks 3-5; it exploded +60 (21->81). Predicted correct stable/up; it collapsed 69->17. Wrong predicted flat/+1; actually fell 9->2. Empty ~1 vs actual 0 is the only near-hit. Direction wrong on the dominant cluster.

trace_movement.justification: Predicted token consumption +20-25% from second calls; actual prompt 1592->916 and completion 215->107, both fell ~42%. Predicted doubled retrieval pool (16+16); actual retrieved count fell 49->16. Every verifiable trace claim contradicted.

side_effects.justification: Predicted regression risk was hallucination from noisy retrieval; actual catastrophic regression (passrate 0.69->0.17) came from mass abstention, opposite direction. Predicted +0.03/+0.06 improvement. The real failure mode was missed; no correct risk call.
